issues.description: Counter trigger should have a condition checking Life cards ≤ 2 before executing any actions. Currently, the power boost executes unconditionally.
Second effect uses 'Trigger' but should be part of the same Counter effect. The GiveDon and Rest actions are conditional consequences of the same counter, not separate triggers.
GiveDon action is missing the Rest duration/consequence. Card text states 'add... and rest it' — the DON!! must be added in a resting state.
'EndOfBattle' is acceptable but 'DuringBattle' may be more precise for counter damage mitigation effects.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
